_comment: Copy this file to config.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. For deployments (Railway, CI) supply the same JSON in the MBBB_CONFIG_JSON env var instead. Sync reads config.json first, then MBBB_CONFIG_JSON.
_comment_sources: Order sets priority. When the same content (SHA-256) appears in more than one source, the FIRST source listed wins the canonical download; a later source only contributes content with no replica in an earlier one.
_comment_deprioritize: Optional, and the LOWEST priority of all (below source order). When the same content appears in more than one place, a copy whose folder name OR original filename contains one of these (case-insensitive substring) patterns loses to any other copy. Use it for by-instrument re-index folders ('indexed by instrument') or redundant duplicates ('copy of').

google._comment: Authentication is by Google service account only. The source folders are public, so no folder sharing is needed — the service account just provides Drive API credentials. Paste the JSON key Google Cloud gives you here, inline.
